Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Henning for Michael Ghiselli.

The Court stated that the Trust is administered in Contra Costa County, that the Family lives there, that the day to day activities take place there and that the matter should be transferred by way of a petition. The matter was taken under submission to determine the appropriate manner in which to obtain change of venue.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Continued To Jul-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Henning for Michael Ghiselli.

The Court stated that verification from Katherine and Michael (Co-Trustees) was needed on the declarations and that the declaration of Katherine states further additional facts therefore requires verification. In addition, the Court raised the issue of venue stating that the Special Needs Trust was being administered solely in Contra Costa County, and that the day to day business and all activities in the Trust were being done there. The matter was continued to July 6, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to obtain the verifications. The accounting order will include that the venue will change over to Contra Costa County. The Motion for Attorney's Fees will be specially set for July 6, 2010 as well.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
